This directory contains Vale styles used by the repository.

- `Spore/`: project-specific rules for terminology, SEP headings, normative keywords, and identifiers.
- `config/vocabularies/Spore/`: accepted project vocabulary.
- `Google/`, `alex/`, `write-good/`: vendored upstream Vale styles so CI and prek do not depend on `vale sync`.

Vendored upstream sources:

- `Google/`: https://github.com/vale-cli/Google
- `alex/`: https://github.com/vale-cli/alex
- `write-good/`: https://github.com/vale-cli/write-good
